prose.title: 92r mos
prose.body: 92R is the Military Occupational Specialty (MOS) code for a parachute rigger in the U.S. Army. Parachute riggers are responsible for inspecting, packing, and maintaining parachutes, as well as ensuring they are in proper working condition. They may also be involved in the rigging and recovery of airdrop payloads. Additionally, parachute riggers may be involved in the repair and maintenance of other related equipment, such as harnesses and cargo nets. It is a critical role in ensuring the safety and effectiveness of airborne operations in the military.
